Title: Relates to threats or harm to animals as a means of coercion or coercive control
Summary: Provides that the use of threats or harm to animals shall be considered a means of coercion or coercive control.
LawCode: Amd §135.60, Pen L; amd §575, Exec L
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the penal law and the executive law, in relation to threats or harm to animals as a means of coercion or coercive control
